caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, is visible in a small picture-in-picture window on the left side of the screen, sitting in a room with a decorated Christmas tree behind him. The main part of the screen displays a virtual keyboard interface under the heading "ITEM NAME." A text input field at the top evolves as the man interacts with the keyboard. In the first frame, the input field is empty. By the second frame, a yellow highlight appears on the letter "m." In the third frame, the text "m|" appears in the input field, and the highlight moves to the letter "a." In the final frame, the text changes to "maxx c|" as the highlight moves to the letter "c." The keyboard includes rows of letters, numbers, and functional buttons such as "EXIT," "BACK," "CAPS," "CLEAR," and "DONE."
